name: Test 05 - Remove All Products and Verify Empty State
description: Add a product and then use 'remove all' to verify the empty cart message

steps.name: Add product to cart: 'Cropped Stay Groovy off white'

parameters.name: element
parameters.value: <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://react-shopping-cart-67954.firebaseapp.com/'> selector='.sc-124al1g-2 >> internal:has="internal:text=\\"Cropped Stay Groovy off white\\"s" >> internal:role=button[name="Add to cart"i]'>

parameters.name: element
parameters.value: <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://react-shopping-cart-67954.firebaseapp.com/'> selector="[class^='sc-11uohgb-0'] >> [title='remove product from cart'] >> nth=0">

steps.name: Verify that the element contains the expected text

parameters.name: element
parameters.value: <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://react-shopping-cart-67954.firebaseapp.com/'> selector='internal:text="Add some products in the cart"i'>
